commitMessage: Add user feedback README with feature requests

topics.title: User feedback collected on color blind mode and high scores
topics.trigger: User feedback was gathered and needed a place to be recorded for future reference and prioritization.
topics.response: Created README3.md with two user-submitted feature requests: a color blind mode and the ability to view other players' high scores.
topics.decisions: Recording raw user feedback in a dedicated file keeps it visible and accessible without requiring any product or engineering decisions at this stage. The requests are preserved as-is for future triage rather than being immediately acted upon.
topics.todo: Triage and prioritize the two feature requests (color blind mode, high score visibility) into the product backlog.
